headline: Brown-Forman Q3 Earnings: Is It Likely to Surpass Estimates?
summary: BF.B heads toward Q3 results, with revenues and earnings expected to fall, as soft demand, lower volumes and cost pressures cloud its outlook.

raw.headline: Brown-Forman Q3 Earnings: Is It Likely to Surpass Estimates?

headline: Conagra Brands to Release Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Earnings on April 1, 2026
summary: Conagra Brands, Inc. (NYSE: CAG) will release its fiscal 2026 third quarter results on Wednesday, April 1, 2026. A press release and supplemental materials, including pre-recorded remarks, will be issued that morning prior to a live question-and-answer session with the investment community at 9:30 a.m. ET.

headline: Will Mondelez's Organic Sales Growth Keep Momentum Going in 2026?
summary: MDLZ posted 4.3% organic net revenue growth in 2025 on cocoa-driven pricing. It targets flat to 2% growth in 2026 amid soft demand.
